{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230357032E68F69D02F74796F52F"}"},"total":92},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7313024437526201139","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，有创新，就是有点不够看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1702697103,"group_id":"7308719730343283749","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"这个作者在上学，写得不是很好","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx2TKnUur4Q3pyeShOeg7RjQTllvRXvmGe0IHExeCg3H","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/fc9f57e73b3c45078355d66c417c2049~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789889&x-signature=A0%2BmWRqhYNp1mJlX2WWeh6nNe9A%3D","user_id":"2242626497033111","user_name":"幽默也小调"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2242626497033111","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7308719730343283749","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越九叔世界，身怀先天道体，拜师九叔，获得无限修炼系统。
别人只能修炼十级，秦九阳却能修炼九十九级、九百九十九级，根本没有上限！
手决、法术、步罡、茅山拳法、茅山剑法、符篆炼丹、阵法医术，全都max，修炼就是纵享丝滑，完全停不下来！
九叔：茅山降魔剑只有九重，他居然施展出了九百多重，太变态了！
四目道长：我的赶尸术，最多赶三十只尸体，而秦九阳，居然赶了一支军队，太恐怖了！
千鹤道长：我千鹤一生只打高端局，可自从秦九阳出现，没得打了，皇族僵尸刚出棺，就被一道两人合抱粗的天雷劈死了！
………………
清民年间，军阀割据，民不聊生。
魅妖美狐、黑山老妖。
勾魂小倩、诱人白蛇。
南毛北马、苗疆巫蛊。
佛道两门，三教九流。
秦九阳：天地玄宗，万气本根，广修亿劫，证吾神通！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7bb945643eaf6072fa9af3f45d9d33ef","author":"飞天火","author_id":"","book_id":"7308719730343283749","book_name":"拜师九叔，从任家镇开始无敌","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3278人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":383,"name":"九叔","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=383&name=九叔&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7308732016491498534","read_count":"3278","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"325633"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.1","serial_count":"154","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,九叔,无敌,架空,东方玄幻,同人","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b3133f19837a295d953345af398f25a3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779393423&x-signature=cvY3e1pCjoM%2BFjYkdJnKJuYLBtY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book
